---
title: "Organisms Under Pressure"
---

::: {.section-intro}
# How do organisms respond under pressure?

Projects in this theme examine biological response across scales, from molecular pathways and proteomics to immune response, thermal stress, infection, and health outcomes.
:::

::: {.project-card-grid}

::: {.project-card}
![Field or health research image for schistosomiasis and immune response](images/schisto-health-outcomes.jpg){.project-card-image}

### Schistosomiasis, anemia, and immune response

Collaborative work examining how infection relates to human health outcomes, immune response, and disease burden.

**Immunology · anemia · infection · public health**

[See more →](projects/schisto-health-outcomes/){.see-more}
:::

::: {.project-card}
![Oyster or marine laboratory image](images/oyster-proteomics.jpg){.project-card-image}

### Oyster proteomics and temperature response

Proteomic profiling of developmental and temperature-influenced physiological responses in a bivalve mollusc.

**Proteomics · temperature stress · development**

[See more →](projects/oyster-proteomics/){.see-more}
:::

::: {.project-card}
![Thermal stress or snail temperature response image](images/schisto-temperature.jpg){.project-card-image}

### Thermal response of schistosomiasis transmission

Collaborative modeling work examining how temperature and seasonal fluctuation shape snail behavior, parasite dynamics, and transmission.

**Thermal ecology · infectious disease · modeling**

[See more →](projects/schisto-temperature/){.see-more}
:::

::: {.project-card}
![Laboratory image for molecular biology and treatment response](images/cancer-treatment-resistance.jpg){.project-card-image}

### Treatment-resistant cancer pathways

Earlier biomedical research that built wet lab experience in molecular pathways, treatment resistance, Western blotting, DNA extraction, and bacterial culture.

**Molecular biology · wet lab · treatment response**

[See more →](projects/cancer-treatment-resistance/){.see-more}
:::

:::
